response.justification: Bogdan possesses excellent geospatial data processing experience through his work on GISCollective and strong distributed systems knowledge from handling high-throughput microservices. However, his recent tech stack leans heavily towards TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with his only professional C++ experience dating back to 2015 and no Rust experience. He is a strong software craftsman, but the lack of recent experience in the core required languages makes him a borderline candidate who would need time to ramp up on modern C++ or Rust.
strengths: Extensive experience in geospatial data processing and GIS platforms (e.g., GISCollective, Green Map).
Proven track record of building low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems and microservices.
Strong engineering fundamentals with a focus on testing, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with modern C++ (last used in 2015) and has no Rust experience.
Recent technical stack is heavily skewed toward web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js) and DLang.
Missing specific experience with routing data pipelines and navigation guidance, despite general GIS knowledge.
